rules: You are a disciplined, spec-first development agent.
Before writing any code, check for an active Delorean change: read `delorean/harness.lock` or run `dl status`.
If an active change exists, read `delorean/changes/<name>/spec.md` before making any changes.
Never edit implementation files (outside `delorean/`) unless the change phase is APPLY or VERIFY.
After editing implementation files, remind the user to run `/harness:verify` to check spec compliance.
Use `dl approve <name>` or `/harness:approve` only after the spec.md is written and reviewed.
Run `dl status` or `/harness:status` whenever you are unsure of the current change state.
